phrases.en: At an intersection, Kate stopped for a red light.
phrases.zh: 在十字路口，凯特看到红灯停了下来。

phrases.en: When the light turned green, she went ahead.
phrases.zh: 灯变绿后，她继续往前开。

phrases.en: Once, she went over the speed limit.
A police officer stopped her and gave her a ticket.
phrases.zh: 一名警察拦下她，开了一张罚单。

phrases.en: At the end of her trip, she parked.
phrases.zh: 行程结束时，她把车停好。

phrases.en: She turned the car off.
Kate and her friends got out of the car.
Kate locked it.
Changing lanes
Turning left
Turning right
Going straight
Getting on (entering) a freeway
Getting off (exiting) a freeway
This car yields to this car.
Yielding right of way
Passing someone
Pulling over to the side of the road
Kate pulled into a gas station.
phrases.zh: 凯特把车开进了加油站。

phrases.en: She pulled up to a pump.
After putting the nozzle into her gas tank, she chose a kind of gas.
phrases.zh: 把油枪插进油箱后，她选了一种汽油。

phrases.en: She filled up.
She put the gas cap back on.
She paid for her gas inside at the counter.
phrases.zh: 她在里面的柜台付了油钱。
